rationale: The proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption amounts under Tax Code §11.13(b). Elec. Code §272.008 governs optional bilingual election materials. The two provisions address unrelated subjects and do not interact.
quote: Sec. 272.008. OPTIONAL USE OF BILINGUAL MATERIALS. (a) The governing body of the political subdivision responsible for the expenses of an election may require the use of bilingual election materials in one or more election precincts.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
